# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Distribute Application

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - release/*
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_configuration:
        description: 'Build configuration (Release/Debug)'
        required: true
        default: 'Release'
        type: choice
        options:
          - Release
          - Debug
      retention_days:
        description: 'Artifact retention period (days)'
        required: true
        default: '30'
        type: choice
        options:
          - '7'
          - '14'
          - '30'
          - '90'

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: write

env:
  BUILD_CONFIG: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_configuration || 'Release' }}
  ARTIFACT_RETENTION: ${{ github.event.inputs.retention_days || '30' }}

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    outputs:
      build_version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
      build_sha: ${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
      build_timestamp: ${{ steps.version.outputs.timestamp }}

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate build version
        id: version
        run: |
          SHORT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
          TIMESTAMP=$(date +'%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')
          if [[ "${GITHUB_REF}" == refs/tags/* ]]; then
            VERSION="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}"
          else
            BRANCH_NAME=$(echo "${GITHUB_REF#refs/heads/}" | sed 's/\//-/g')
            VERSION="${BRANCH_NAME}-${SHORT_SHA}"
          fi
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "short_sha=${SHORT_SHA}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "timestamp=${TIMESTAMP}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "Build version: ${VERSION}"

      - name: Set up build environment
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci --ignore-scripts
          npm rebuild

      - name: Run security audit
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high || true

      - name: Lint and validate
        run: |
          npm run lint --if-present
          npm run validate --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          npm run build -- --configuration=${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production
          BUILD_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
          BUILD_SHA: ${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}

      - name: Prepare compiled binaries
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts/binaries
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            cp -r dist/* artifacts/binaries/
          elif [ -d "build" ]; then
            cp -r build/* artifacts/binaries/
          elif [ -d "out" ]; then
            cp -r out/* artifacts/binaries/
          else
            echo "Warning: No standard build output directory found"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Prepare configuration files
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts/config
          CONFIG_FILES=$(find . -maxdepth 3 \
            \( -name "*.config.js" \
            -o -name "*.config.ts" \
            -o -name "*.config.json" \
            -o -name "*.yaml" \
            -o -name "*.yml" \
            -o -name ".env.example" \
            -o -name "*.conf" \) \
            ! -path "./node_modules/*" \
            ! -path "./.git/*" \
            ! -path "./artifacts/*" \
            ! -name ".env" \
            ! -name "*.local.*" \
            ! -name "*secret*" \
            ! -name "*credential*" \
            2>/dev/null || true)
          if [ -n "$CONFIG_FILES" ]; then
            echo "$CONFIG_FILES" | while IFS= read -r file; do
              if [ -f "$file" ]; then
                DIR=$(dirname "$file" | sed 's|^\./||')
                mkdir -p "artifacts/config/$DIR"
                cp "$file" "artifacts/config/$DIR/"
              fi
            done
          fi
          if [ -d "config" ]; then
            cp -r config/* artifacts/config/ 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

      - name: Prepare deployment scripts
        run: |
          mkdir -p artifacts/deploy
          for dir in deploy deployment scripts/deploy scripts/deployment .deploy; do
            if [ -d "$dir" ]; then
              cp -r "$dir"/* artifacts/deploy/ 2>/dev/null || true
            fi
          done
          DEPLOY_SCRIPTS=$(find . -maxdepth 3 \
            \( -name "deploy*.sh" \
            -o -name "deploy*.py" \
            -o -name "deploy*.js" \
            -o -name "rollback*.sh" \
            -o -name "migrate*.sh" \
            -o -name "setup*.sh" \
            -o -name "Dockerfile*" \
            -o -name "docker-compose*.yml" \
            -o -name "docker-compose*.yaml" \
            -o -name "Makefile" \) \
            ! -path "./node_modules/*" \
            ! -path "./.git/*" \
            ! -path "./artifacts/*" \
            2>/dev/null || true)
          if [ -n "$DEPLOY_SCRIPTS" ]; then
            echo "$DEPLOY_SCRIPTS" | while IFS= read -r file; do
              if [ -f "$file" ]; then
                cp "$file" artifacts/deploy/ 2>/dev/null || true
              fi
            done
          fi
          chmod +x artifacts/deploy/*.sh 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > artifacts/BUILD_MANIFEST.json << EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}",
            "commit_sha": "${{ github.sha }}",
            "short_sha": "${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}",
            "branch": "${{ github.ref_name }}",
            "build_number": "${{ github.run_number }}",
            "build_id": "${{ github.run_id }}",
            "build_configuration": "${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }}",
            "timestamp": "${{ steps.version.outputs.timestamp }}",
            "triggered_by": "${{ github.actor }}",
            "event": "${{ github.event_name }}",
            "repository": "${{ github.repository }}",
            "runner_os": "${{ runner.os }}",
            "runner_arch": "${{ runner.arch }}",
            "artifacts": {
              "binaries": "binaries/",
              "config": "config/",
              "deploy": "deploy/"
            }
          }
          EOF

      - name: Generate checksums
        run: |
          cd artifacts
          find . -type f ! -name "CHECKSUMS.sha256" -print0 | sort -z | xargs -0 sha256sum > CHECKSUMS.sha256
          echo "Generated checksums:"
          cat CHECKSUMS.sha256

      - name: Scan artifacts for secrets
        run: |
          echo "Scanning artifacts for potential secrets..."
          PATTERNS=(
            'password'
            'secret'
            'api_key'
            'apikey'
            'access_token'
            'private_key'
            'BEGIN RSA'
            'BEGIN PRIVATE'
            'BEGIN EC PRIVATE'
            'AWS_SECRET'
            'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}'
          )
          FOUND_SECRETS=false
          for pattern in "${PATTERNS[@]}"; do
            MATCHES=$(grep -ril "$pattern" artifacts/ 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then
              echo "WARNING: Potential secret pattern '$pattern' found in:"
              echo "$MATCHES"
              FOUND_SECRETS=true
            fi
          done
          if [ "$FOUND_SECRETS" = true ]; then
            echo "::error::Potential secrets detected in artifacts. Review before proceeding."
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "No secrets detected in artifacts."

      - name: Upload compiled binaries
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binaries-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: artifacts/binaries/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: config-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: artifacts/config/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: warn
          compression-level: 6

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deploy-scripts-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: artifacts/deploy/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: warn
          compression-level: 6

      - name: Upload build manifest and checksums
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-metadata-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: |
            artifacts/BUILD_MANIFEST.json
            artifacts/CHECKSUMS.sha256
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: error

      - name: Upload complete build bundle
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}-${{ steps.version.outputs.short_sha }}
          path: artifacts/
          retention-days: ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }}
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 9

  verify-artifacts:
    name: Verify Build Artifacts
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - name: Download complete build bundle
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}-${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}
          path: downloaded-artifacts/

      - name: Verify checksums
        run: |
          cd downloaded-artifacts
          echo "Verifying artifact integrity..."
          sha256sum -c CHECKSUMS.sha256
          echo "All checksums verified successfully."

      - name: Verify build manifest
        run: |
          echo "Build Manifest:"
          cat downloaded-artifacts/BUILD_MANIFEST.json | python3 -m json.tool
          VERSION=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('downloaded-artifacts/BUILD_MANIFEST.json'))['version'])")
          echo "Verified build version: ${VERSION}"

      - name: List all artifacts
        run: |
          echo "=== Compiled Binaries ==="
          find downloaded-artifacts/binaries -type f 2>/dev/null | head -50 || echo "No binaries found"
          echo ""
          echo "=== Configuration Files ==="
          find downloaded-artifacts/config -type f 2>/dev/null | head -50 || echo "No config files found"
          echo ""
          echo "=== Deployment Scripts ==="
          find downloaded-artifacts/deploy -type f 2>/dev/null | head -50 || echo "No deploy scripts found"
          echo ""
          echo "=== Total artifact size ==="
          du -sh downloaded-artifacts/

  notify:
    name: Notify Team
    needs:
      - build
      - verify-artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: always()
    timeout-minutes: 5

    steps:
      - name: Build summary
        run: |
          BUILD_STATUS="${{ needs.verify-artifacts.result }}"
          VERSION="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_version }}"
          SHA="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_sha }}"
          TIMESTAMP="${{ needs.build.outputs.build_timestamp }}"
          RUN_URL="${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"

          echo "## Build Distribution Summary" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Property | Value |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|----------|-------|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Status** | ${BUILD_STATUS} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Version** | ${VERSION} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Commit** | ${SHA} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Configuration** | ${{ env.BUILD_CONFIG }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Branch** | ${{ github.ref_name }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Triggered by** | ${{ github.actor }} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Build Time** | ${TIMESTAMP} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| **Retention** | ${{ env.ARTIFACT_RETENTION }} days |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "### Available Artifacts" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "Download artifacts from the [Actions run page](${RUN_URL}):" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **\`binaries-${VERSION}-${SHA}\`** - Compiled application binaries" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **\`config-${VERSION}-${SHA}\`** - Configuration files" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **\`deploy-scripts-${VERSION}-${SHA}\`** - Deployment scripts" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **\`build-metadata-${VERSION}-${SHA}\`** - Build manifest and checksums" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "- **\`complete-build-${VERSION}-${SHA}\`** - Complete build bundle (all of the above)" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
